accurate.why: All claims align with the bill text and accurate context (SSA administers Section 234 DI demonstration authority; prior dates of Dec 31, 2021/2022 are correct).

no_hallucinations.why: The added context that SSA administers the program and that Section 234 of the Social Security Act is amended is accurate and not fabricated.

states_purpose.why: Clearly states the bill temporarily reauthorizes DI demonstration project authority to remove barriers to work for disabled Americans.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Correctly identifies amendments to Section 234 (and the trust-fund expenditure provision) of the Social Security Act and the prior sunset dates.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes the key new safeguard that participation may not reduce a participant's total income and the evaluation-metrics requirement.

effective_dates.why: Correctly states the amendments take effect January 1, 2027, and notes the new sunset dates of Dec 31, 2030/2031.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures the date extensions, waiver authority extension, 90-to-120-day change, payment source provisions, income safeguard, and technical amendments.

objective_tone.why: The summary is neutral and descriptive with no advocacy or editorializing.

coherent.why: Well-organized and internally consistent, moving logically from purpose to provisions to effective date.

concise.why: The summary is tight and free of padding or repetition.

correct_entities.why: Correctly names SSA, the Commissioner, Section 234 of the Social Security Act, and the two trust funds.

correct_figures.why: All stated dates and figures (2021/2022, 2030/2031, Dec 30 2021, 90-to-120 days, Jan 1 2027) match the bill text.
